title: len-to-u32 conversion: extract helper
description: u32::try_from(x.len()).map_err(|_| WolfHsmError::Ffi { code: -1, func: "..." }) appears ~12 times across aes.rs, ecc.rs, rsa.rs, ed25519.rs, cmac.rs, rng.rs, sha.rs. Extract a private helper: fn len_u32(n: usize, ctx: &'static str) -> Result<u32, WolfHsmError> { u32::try_from(n).map_err(|_| WolfHsmError::Ffi { code: -1, func: ctx }) }. Every call site collapses to len_u32(slice.len(), "wolfhsm_xxx: input too large")?.
